title: Thornwick's Ruin
visual_description: Caelin rides his horse into Thornwick at first light. Ash muffles the cobblestones, and the street is packed with soot, melted stone, and hot glass. Houses have slumped rather than burned, with translucent wooden beams, sagging doorframes, and window mullions weeping clear, frozen droplets.
prompt: ruined village of Thornwick: stone melted and re-solidified into smooth glossy curves, wooden beams turned translucent, doorframes sagging into organic shapes, cobblestones ridged like cooled lava, everything coated in thick pale ash Caelin rides his horse into Thornwick at first light. title: Rescuing Mira
visual_description: Caelin kneels in the debris of a collapsed cottage, looking at Mira, an eight-year-old girl with a soot-streaked, freckled face, pinned by a shimmering, hot roof beam. He touches the beam, and it softens, turning glassy and viscous, peeling away like honey. Mira stares up at him with wide eyes, a mix of terror and wonder.

title: Mira's Account
visual_description: Caelin holds a trembling Mira in his arms, her small fingers clutching his travel cloak, in the smoky village square. Her lips quiver as she whispers about a 'red lady' and a rhyme. Elder Gareth emerges from the smoke, his face blistered and beard singed, but his eyes remain steady with grief and strength.
